text:
/ci1 2 ヒツギ、張り切るのはいいが
無理して突っ走んじゃねえぞ。

/ci1 2 そ、そんなことわかってる！
それより戦闘に集中してよ！

/ci1 2 Hitsugi, it's good to keep yourself
limber and your mind unclouded, but don't go
rushing in half-cocked.
/ci1 2 I-I know that! Focus on the fight!

ヒツギ、張り切るのはいいが
無理して突っ走んじゃねえぞ。

そ、そんなことわかってる！
それより戦闘に集中してよ！

Hitsugi, it's good to keep yourself limber and
your mind unclouded, but don't go rushing in
half-cocked.
I-I know that! Focus on the fight!
